title: T4127 Payroll Deductions Formulas - Canada.ca
content:
## T4127 Payroll Deductions Formulas
The Payroll Deductions Formulas guide (T4127) effective July 1, 2026, is now available.
- T4127 - Current year
- T4127 - Previous-year guides
To get quick and easy access to new payroll deductions tables and other recently announced tax information, you can subscribe, free of charge , to one or more of these electronic mailing lists .

## Business Information
If you cannot find an answer to a question about your payroll requirements or need assistance using the calculator, call Business Enquiries at 1-800-959-5525 .
- Payroll Deductions Online Calculator (PDOC)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
